title: Character Creation
description: Race selection and starting stat allocation for bards. Half-Elf, Wood Elf, Human, and Vah Shir options.

title: Zeal & Setup
description: Client settings and technical setup. Instrument swapping, lag reduction, swarming keybinds, and FPS.

title: Server Rules
description: Project Quarm rules that impact bards. Zone monopolization, AFK rules, and bard song pulsing exemptions.

title: Acronyms & Abbreviations
description: Reference glossary of common EverQuest shorthand: general terms, class names, bard-specific, zones, and raid lingo.

title: Leveling Route
description: Best leveling path for bards on Quarm. Zones, ZEMs, quests, and strategies by level range.

title: Melodies
description: Song twisting, melody commands, and essential songs for Quarm bards. Covers 2, 3, and 4-song twisting and timing.

title: Song Compendium
description: Complete filterable list of all bard songs by level, instrument type, and effect. Searchable reference for every song.

title: Instruments
description: Instrument progression for bards. Percussion, stringed, brass, and wind instrument best-in-slot by level.

title: PBAoE Swarming
description: AoE kiting technique with PBAoE DoT songs. Song rotations by level, instrument swapping, and group support melodies.

title: Charm Swarming
description: Reverse charm kiting for solo XP and farming. Body pulling, charm technique, and best spots.

title: Chanting (Solo Kiting)
description: Fear kiting and DoT kiting technique for solo bards. Snare, Chant of Flame, Chant of Frost, and single-target rotations.

title: AA Leveling Spots
description: Best zones for grinding alternate advancement at 60: Fungus Grove, Chardok, Maiden's Eye, and Dragon Necropolis. AA recommendations included.

title: Bard Epic 1.0
description: Full walkthrough for the Singing Short Sword epic quest. Relay race, Serra's Doll, Mystical Lute, and final turn-in.

title: AFK Barding (Group Support)
description: Melody setups for supporting your group. Haste songs, mana/HP regen, and utility songs for raids and groups.

title: Cancel Magic & NPC Dispels
description: How NPC dispel abilities work: the dispel formula, buff order strategy, and how bards can protect buffs on raids.

title: Sebilis Key (Trakanon Idol)
description: How to obtain the Trakanon Idol to enter Old Sebilis. Kill froglok forager and hunter in Trakanon's Teeth, hand in to Emperor Ganak.

title: Coldain Prayer Shawl
description: Eight-stage shawl progression through Thurgadin. Tradeskills, faction, and a raid event for top-tier shoulder slot.

title: Ring of Dain Frostreaver IV
description: Ten-stage Coldain Ring War quest from Ring 1 through the Dain Ring. Step-by-step guide for all ten rings.

title: Sleeper's Key
description: Obtain the Sleeper's Key from Jaled Dar's Shade in Dragon Necropolis by turning in any one of six dragon talismans.

title: Sleeper's Tomb Key
description: Full guide to the Sleeper's Key, the four Warders, their loot tables, and the replacement key from Nelef the Trader.

title: Ssraeshza Temple Key
description: Ring of the Shissar and Zazuzh's Key guide. Kill Commanders and Generals, combine components in Taskmaster's Pouch.

title: Vex Thal Key
description: Assemble the Scepter of Shadows from a frame, 10 Lucid Shards across Luclin zones, and a Glowing Orb of Luclinite.

title: Hollowshade Moors War
description: How the three-faction zone war between Owlbears, Sonic Wolves, and Grimlings works. How to trigger, lock, and reset it.

title: Voice of the Serpent Farm
description: Solo bard guide for farming the Voice of the Serpent (+60% singing modifier). Drain, melee, and mez cycle phases.

title: Flowing Thought
description: FT breakpoints for charm sustain. How much Flowing Thought you need for perma-charm and endless swarm.

title: Clickies & Useful Items
description: Essential clicky items every Quarm bard should own: JBoots, VoTS, invis clicks, dispel fodder, regen, and illusion masks.

title: Vah Shir Cloak Quests
description: Complete guide to Shar Vahl cloak quests for all five Vah Shir classes. Citizenship through Garrison cloak.

title: Epic 1.0
description: Complete walkthrough for the bard epic 1.0 quest. Singing Short Sword.

title: PBAoE XP Penalty
description: How the experience penalty applies to PBAoE damage. Penalty scaling by level difference and enchanter memblur workaround.

title: Zone Connections
description: Visual zone connection map covering Classic, Kunark, Velious, and Luclin. All zone adjacencies in one reference.

title: Bard Pro
description: Bard song modifier and stacking calculator. Select your gear, AAs, and instruments to see song values.
